parameters-en.Frequency: Controls the frequency of the filter, which determines the brightness of your sound.
parameters-en.Q: Adjusts filter width to add more or less additional emphasis on the selected frequency.
parameters-en.Wave: Selects one of eight synth waveforms. These all sound quite different, so experiment.
parameters-en.Pitch: Sets the pitch over a 2 octave range.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the synth and the dry signal. At 0%, no synth is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
